name: Ghislaine Dedoldia
alt_names: ギレーヌ・デドルディア
description: __Ghislaine Dedoldia__ is the daughter of Gustav the former Doldia village chief, and the mentor of [Eris](https://anilist.co/character/88349/Eris-Boreas-Greyrat) and she is also the student of [Rudeus Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) in magic and other subjects. She is one of the few people who have become a Sword King.
